# PHIL.040 ? Yogacara

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** yogacara

## Core Principles
Consciousness-only; mind as foundation; transformation of consciousness; storehouse consciousness; phenomenology of experience

## Application
Recognize mind as basis of experience; transform consciousness; examine mental processes; phenomenological analysis; idealist ontology

## Key Values
- Consciousness primacy
- Mental transformation
- Phenomenology
- Idealism
